contents.value:
```typescript
function Controller(prefix?: string | string[]): ClassDecorator
```
Marks a class as a NestJS controller. Accepts an optional route path prefix or array of prefixes. Controllers handle incoming HTTP requests and return responses.

```typescript
function Get(path?: string | string[]): MethodDecorator
```
Routes HTTP GET requests to the decorated method. Accepts an optional route path. Used to retrieve resources.

```typescript
function Post(path?: string | string[]): MethodDecorator
```
Routes HTTP POST requests to the decorated method. Used to create new resources.

```typescript
function Put(path?: string | string[]): MethodDecorator
```
Routes HTTP PUT requests to the decorated method. Used to replace an entire resource.

```typescript
function Patch(path?: string | string[]): MethodDecorator
```
Routes HTTP PATCH requests to the decorated method. Used to partially update a resource.

```typescript
function Delete(path?: string | string[]): MethodDecorator
```
Routes HTTP DELETE requests to the decorated method. Used to remove a resource.

```typescript
function Module(metadata: ModuleMetadata): ClassDecorator
```
Marks a class as a NestJS module. Accepts metadata object with `imports`, `controllers`, `providers`, and `exports` arrays. Modules organize the application structure.

```typescript
function Injectable(options?: InjectableOptions): ClassDecorator
```
Marks a class as a provider that can be managed by the NestJS IoC container. Enables dependency injection for services, guards, pipes, interceptors, etc.

```typescript
function Inject(token?: string | symbol | Type): ParameterDecorator
```
Injects a provider by token. Used for non-class-based (custom) provider injection, such as string or symbol tokens.

```typescript
function Optional(): ParameterDecorator
```
Marks a constructor parameter as optional. Prevents errors when the injected provider is not available in the current scope.

```typescript
function Body(property?: string): ParameterDecorator
```
Extracts the request body or a specific property from it. When a property key is provided, only that nested value is extracted.

```typescript
function Param(property?: string): ParameterDecorator
```
Extracts a route parameter or all route parameters from the request URL path.

```typescript
function Query(property?: string): ParameterDecorator
```
Extracts query string parameters from the request URL. Optionally extracts a single named query parameter.

```typescript
function Headers(property?: string): ParameterDecorator
```
Extracts headers from the request. When a header name is provided, returns only that header's value.

```typescript
function Req(): ParameterDecorator
```
Injects the underlying platform request object (e.g., Express Request). Provides full access to the raw request.

```typescript
function Res(options?: { passthrough?: boolean }): ParameterDecorator
```
Injects the underlying platform response object. Note: using `@Res()` disables NestJS standard response handling unless `{ passthrough: true }` is set.

```typescript
function HttpCode(statusCode: number): MethodDecorator
```
Sets the HTTP response status code for the decorated route handler. By default, POST returns 201 and other methods return 200.

```typescript
function Header(name: string, value: string): MethodDecorator
```
Sets a custom response header for the decorated route handler.

```typescript
function Redirect(url?: string, statusCode?: number): MethodDecorator
```
Redirects the response to the given URL. Default status code is 302 (Found).

```typescript
function Render(template: string): MethodDecorator
```
Renders a view template using the configured template engine (e.g., Handlebars, Pug, EJS).

```typescript
function UseGuards(...guards: (CanActivate | Function)[]): MethodDecorator & ClassDecorator
```
Binds guards to the scope of the controller or method. Guards determine whether a request should be handled by the route handler.

```typescript
function UseInterceptors(...interceptors: (NestInterceptor | Function)[]): MethodDecorator & ClassDecorator
```
Binds interceptors to the controller or method scope. Interceptors can transform the result, handle errors, extend behavior, or override methods.

```typescript
function UsePipes(...pipes: (PipeTransform | Function)[]): MethodDecorator & ClassDecorator
```
Binds pipes to the controller or method scope. Pipes transform input data or validate it before the handler is called.

```typescript
function UseFilters(...filters: (ExceptionFilter | Function)[]): MethodDecorator & ClassDecorator
```
Binds exception filters to the controller or method scope. Filters handle exceptions thrown during request processing.

```typescript
function SetMetadata(key: string, value: any): CustomDecorator
```
Attaches custom metadata to a route handler, accessible via the `Reflector` class in guards and interceptors.

```typescript
function Catch(...exceptions: Type[]): ClassDecorator
```
Marks a class as an exception filter for the given exception type(s). The class must implement `ExceptionFilter`.

```typescript
function EventPattern(metadata: any): MethodDecorator
```
Subscribes to an event-based microservice pattern (fire-and-forget). The handler does not return a response to the sender.

```typescript
function MessagePattern(metadata: any): MethodDecorator
```
Subscribes to a request-response microservice message pattern. The handler returns a response to the sender.

```typescript
function WebSocketGateway(options?: GatewayMetadata): ClassDecorator
```
Marks a class as a WebSocket gateway. Accepts optional configuration for port, namespace, and CORS settings.

```typescript
function SubscribeMessage(message: string): MethodDecorator
```
Subscribes to a specific WebSocket message event. The decorated method handles incoming messages matching the event name.

```typescript
function ConnectedSocket(): ParameterDecorator
```
Injects the connected client socket instance into a gateway method parameter.

```typescript
function WebSocketServer(): PropertyDecorator
```
Injects the underlying WebSocket server instance (e.g., Socket.IO Server) as a class property.

```typescript
function Sse(path?: string): MethodDecorator
```
Marks a method as a Server-Sent Events endpoint. The method should return an Observable that emits MessageEvent objects.

```typescript
function Cron(cronTime: string | CronExpression, options?: CronOptions): MethodDecorator
```
Schedules a method to run based on a cron expression. Requires `@nestjs/schedule` and `ScheduleModule.forRoot()`.

```typescript
function Interval(timeout: number): MethodDecorator
```
Schedules a method to run repeatedly at a fixed interval (in milliseconds). Requires `@nestjs/schedule`.

```typescript
function Timeout(timeout: number): MethodDecorator
```
Schedules a method to run once after a specified timeout (in milliseconds). Requires `@nestjs/schedule`.

```typescript
function ApiTags(...tags: string[]): ClassDecorator & MethodDecorator
```
Adds tags to Swagger documentation for grouping and organizing API endpoints.

```typescript
function ApiOperation(options: ApiOperationOptions): MethodDecorator
```
Describes an API operation for Swagger documentation. Accepts summary, description, and other metadata.

```typescript
function ApiResponse(options: ApiResponseOptions): MethodDecorator & ClassDecorator
```
Documents an API response with status code, description, and optional type for Swagger.

```typescript
function ApiProperty(options?: ApiPropertyOptions): PropertyDecorator
```
Decorates a DTO property for Swagger schema documentation. Defines type, description, example, and validation constraints.

```typescript
function ApiBody(options: ApiBodyOptions): MethodDecorator
```
Describes the request body schema for Swagger documentation, including type and content type.

```typescript
function ApiBearerAuth(name?: string): ClassDecorator & MethodDecorator
```
Marks an endpoint as requiring Bearer token authentication in Swagger UI. Adds the lock icon.

```typescript
class NestFactory {
  static create(module: any, options?: NestApplicationOptions): Promise<INestApplication>
  static createMicroservice(module: any, options?: MicroserviceOptions): Promise<INestMicroservice>
}
```
Factory class to create NestJS application and microservice instances. Entry point for bootstrapping.

```typescript
interface INestApplication extends INestApplicationContext
```
Interface for the NestJS HTTP application instance. Provides methods like `listen()`, `use()`, `useGlobalPipes()`, `enableCors()`, `setGlobalPrefix()`, and more.

```typescript
class ModuleRef extends AbstractInstanceResolver
```
Provides access to the internal provider container for dynamic provider resolution. Use `get()` for singletons, `resolve()` for transient/request-scoped providers.

```typescript
class Reflector {
  get<T>(metadataKey: any, target: Function): T
  getAllAndOverride<T>(metadataKey: any, targets: Function[]): T
  getAllAndMerge<T>(metadataKey: any, targets: Function[]): T
}
```
Helper class to retrieve metadata set via `@SetMetadata()`. Commonly used in guards and interceptors.

```typescript
class ConfigService {
  get<T>(propertyPath: string, defaultValue?: T): T | undefined
  getOrThrow<T>(propertyPath: string): T
}
```
Service to access configuration values loaded by ConfigModule. Supports nested paths and typed returns.

```typescript
class TypeOrmModule {
  static forRoot(options?: TypeOrmModuleOptions): DynamicModule
  static forFeature(entities: EntityClassOrSchema[]): DynamicModule
}
```
Module for integrating TypeORM with NestJS. Use `forRoot()` for database connection and `forFeature()` to register repositories.

```typescript
class MongooseModule {
  static forRoot(uri: string, options?: MongooseModuleOptions): DynamicModule
  static forFeature(models: ModelDefinition[]): DynamicModule
}
```
Module for integrating Mongoose ODM with NestJS. Use `forRoot()` for connection and `forFeature()` to register schemas.

```typescript
class JwtModule {
  static register(options: JwtModuleOptions): DynamicModule
  static registerAsync(options: JwtModuleAsyncOptions): DynamicModule
}
```
Module for JWT token generation and verification. Provides JwtService for signing and verifying tokens.

```typescript
class BullModule {
  static forRoot(options?: BullRootModuleOptions): DynamicModule
  static registerQueue(...options: BullModuleOptions[]): DynamicModule
}
```
Module for queue management using Bull and Redis for background job processing.

```typescript
class ValidationPipe implements PipeTransform
```
Pipe that validates incoming data using class-validator decorators. Options include `whitelist`, `transform`, `forbidNonWhitelisted`, and `disableErrorMessages`.

```typescript
class ParseIntPipe implements PipeTransform<string, number>
```
Pipe that transforms a string parameter into an integer. Throws `BadRequestException` if the value cannot be parsed.

```typescript
class ParseBoolPipe implements PipeTransform<string, boolean>
```
Pipe that transforms a string parameter into a boolean value. Accepts 'true' and 'false' strings.

```typescript
class ParseArrayPipe implements PipeTransform
```
Pipe that parses and validates arrays. Supports item type validation via the `items` option.

```typescript
class ParseUUIDPipe implements PipeTransform<string, string>
```
Pipe that validates a string parameter is a valid UUID. Supports UUID versions 3, 4, and 5.

```typescript
class ParseEnumPipe<T> implements PipeTransform<string, T>
```
Pipe that validates a parameter is a valid value of the given enum type.

```typescript
class DefaultValuePipe<T> implements PipeTransform
```
Pipe that provides a default value when the parameter is null or undefined.

```typescript
class ParseFloatPipe implements PipeTransform<string, number>
```
Pipe that transforms a string parameter into a floating-point number. Throws `BadRequestException` on failure.

```typescript
function AuthGuard(type?: string | string[]): Type<CanActivate>
```
Guard factory that triggers Passport authentication for a given strategy (e.g., 'jwt', 'local'). Returns a guard class.

```typescript
class ClassSerializerInterceptor implements NestInterceptor
```
Interceptor that serializes response objects using class-transformer. Respects `@Exclude()` and `@Expose()` decorators on entity/DTO classes.

```typescript
class CacheInterceptor implements NestInterceptor
```
Interceptor that automatically caches GET responses. Works with CacheModule. Configurable TTL and cache key.

```typescript
function FileInterceptor(fieldName: string, localOptions?: MulterOptions): Type<NestInterceptor>
```
Interceptor for handling single file uploads via multipart/form-data using Multer. Use with `@UploadedFile()` decorator.

```typescript
function FilesInterceptor(fieldName: string, maxCount?: number, localOptions?: MulterOptions): Type<NestInterceptor>
```
Interceptor for handling multiple file uploads via multipart/form-data using Multer. Use with `@UploadedFiles()` decorator.

```typescript
class HttpException extends Error {
  constructor(response: string | Record<string, any>, status: number)
  getStatus(): number
  getResponse(): string | object
}
```
Base class for all HTTP exceptions in NestJS. All built-in HTTP exceptions extend this class.

```typescript
class BadRequestException extends HttpException
```
Throws a 400 Bad Request HTTP exception. Used when the server cannot process the request due to client error.

```typescript
class UnauthorizedException extends HttpException
```
Throws a 401 Unauthorized HTTP exception. Used when authentication is required and has failed or not been provided.

```typescript
class ForbiddenException extends HttpException
```
Throws a 403 Forbidden HTTP exception. Used when the user is authenticated but lacks permission.

```typescript
class NotFoundException extends HttpException
```
Throws a 404 Not Found HTTP exception. Used when the requested resource does not exist.

```typescript
class ConflictException extends HttpException
```
Throws a 409 Conflict HTTP exception. Used when the request conflicts with the current state of the resource.

```typescript
class InternalServerErrorException extends HttpException
```
Throws a 500 Internal Server Error HTTP exception. Used for unexpected server-side errors.

```typescript
enum HttpStatus {
  OK = 200, CREATED = 201, BAD_REQUEST = 400,
  UNAUTHORIZED = 401, FORBIDDEN = 403, NOT_FOUND = 404, ...
}
```
Enum containing standard HTTP status codes for use with `@HttpCode()` and `HttpException`.

```typescript
class Logger {
  log(message: any, context?: string): void
  error(message: any, trace?: string, context?: string): void
  warn(message: any, context?: string): void
  debug(message: any, context?: string): void
  verbose(message: any, context?: string): void
}
```
Built-in NestJS logger with multiple log levels. Can be replaced with a custom logger implementation.

```typescript
interface ExecutionContext extends ArgumentsHost {
  getClass<T>(): Type<T>
  getHandler(): Function
}
```
Extends ArgumentsHost with methods to determine the current handler and class being invoked. Essential for guards and interceptors.

```typescript
interface ArgumentsHost {
  switchToHttp(): HttpArgumentsHost
  switchToWs(): WsArgumentsHost
  switchToRpc(): RpcArgumentsHost
  getType(): string
}
```
Provides methods to retrieve handler arguments for HTTP, WebSocket, or RPC contexts.

```typescript
static createTestingModule(metadata: ModuleMetadata): TestingModuleBuilder
```
Creates a testing module builder. Call `.compile()` to get a `TestingModule` instance for unit and integration tests.

```typescript
class TestingModule extends NestApplicationContext {
  get<T>(typeOrToken: Type<T> | string | symbol): T
  resolve<T>(typeOrToken: Type<T> | string | symbol): Promise<T>
  createNestApplication(): INestApplication
}
```
Compiled testing module that provides `get()` for singletons and `resolve()` for request-scoped providers.

```typescript
interface DynamicModule extends ModuleMetadata {
  module: Type<any>
  global?: boolean
}
```
Interface returned by static methods like `forRoot()` and `forRootAsync()` for dynamic module registration.

```typescript
class JwtService {
  sign(payload: string | object | Buffer, options?: JwtSignOptions): string
  signAsync(payload: string | object | Buffer, options?: JwtSignOptions): Promise<string>
  verify<T>(token: string, options?: JwtVerifyOptions): T
}
```
Service for signing and verifying JWT tokens. Provided by `JwtModule`.

```typescript
class ThrottlerGuard implements CanActivate
```
Guard that limits request rates based on ThrottlerModule configuration. Apply globally or per-route.

```typescript
enum Transport { TCP, REDIS, NATS, MQTT, GRPC, RMQ, KAFKA }
```
Enum of available microservice transport layers for inter-service communication.

```typescript
abstract class ClientProxy {
  send<TResult, TInput>(pattern: any, data: TInput): Observable<TResult>
  emit<TResult, TInput>(pattern: any, data: TInput): Observable<TResult>
}
```
Proxy class for communicating with microservices. `send()` for request-response, `emit()` for events.

```typescript
class DocumentBuilder {
  setTitle(title: string): this
  setDescription(description: string): this
  setVersion(version: string): this
  addBearerAuth(): this
  build(): OpenAPIObject
}
```
Builder class for creating Swagger/OpenAPI document configuration with a fluent API.

```typescript
class SwaggerModule {
  static createDocument(app: INestApplication, config: OpenAPIObject): OpenAPIObject
  static setup(path: string, app: INestApplication, document: OpenAPIObject): void
}
```
Sets up Swagger UI documentation at the specified path. Call `createDocument()` first, then `setup()`.

```typescript
enum VersioningType { URI, HEADER, MEDIA_TYPE, CUSTOM }
```
Enum for API versioning strategies. URI-based is the most common approach.

```typescript
class HttpService {
  get<T>(url: string, config?: AxiosRequestConfig): Observable<AxiosResponse<T>>
  post<T>(url: string, data?: any, config?: AxiosRequestConfig): Observable<AxiosResponse<T>>
}
```
Service for making HTTP requests using Axios. Returns RxJS Observables.

```typescript
class ParseFilePipe implements PipeTransform
```
Pipe for validating uploaded files. Combine with `MaxFileSizeValidator` and `FileTypeValidator` for comprehensive file validation.
